findingTextShort: Kava reduced anxiety symptom scores in adults.

findingTextNormalized: Reviewed source-backed chemistry context identifies kavalactones as notable constituents in standardized kava preparations.

findingTextShort: CBD has receptor-level signaling context in reviewed records.

findingTextShort: CBD is derived from Cannabis sativa.

findingTextShort: Traditional-use monographs describe context-specific use populations.

findingTextShort: Kava may increase bleeding risk with warfarin.
